{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = The Immolator
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Immolator]] is an orange flame [[Remnant]] that crackles with strange lightning and juggles fireballs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
